name: Peach Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. If using fresh peaches, slice two of them and set aside.
2. Coarsely chop the remaining peach. For frozen fruit, set aside 2 cups.
3. Pour the orange juice into a blender. Add the chopped peach or 1 cup of the sliced frozen peaches.
4. Blend until smooth. Pour into a saucepan.
5. Add the cornstarch and nutmeg to the saucepan. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened.
6. Add the remaining sliced peaches. Heat through.
7. Serve warm.
